title: Crag
description: A mod about combat utility, exploration, and features with depth, centered in the nether.
body:
Crag is a heavy WIP, and there are a lot more features planned for the future. Currently, it adds a new building set in the form of Pumice, and a new unconventional weapon - the Pyriferrum Candelabra. Many of the mod's features are themed around candles and wax.

Planned updates:
- Two new biomes: the Ashen Crags and the Onyx Brinepools
- Several new mobs: the Sundergut, Bull Sundergut, Lamp Moth, Candlewick, Trawler, and more!
- Special utility which doubles as a light source: Blast Lamps + Blast Sparks
- More building blocks
- A variety of food items (will be compatible with Farmer's Delight!)


[Support me on Ko-fi! All donations go towards funding the development of this mod specifically.](https://ko-fi.com/zarkana)
